{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/88030392?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/helwor-01", "id": 88030392, "login": "helwor-01", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg4MDMwMzky", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47382", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary
The connection-test endpoint opened a raw TCP socket to the user-supplied database
host without resolving and range-checking the destination, so private and link-local
addresses (including IPv4-mapped IPv6 forms and `localhost`) reached the driver.

### Details
A new `validateDbConnectionHost` helper resolves hostnames through DNS, parses each
address with `ipaddr.js`, normalises IPv4-mapped IPv6, and rejects addresses in the
private, loopback, link-local, unique-local, reserved, unspecified, broadcast, and
carrier-grade-NAT ranges. `0.0.0.0`, `::`, and the literal `localhost` are special-cased.
The check runs before the existing SSL block in the connection-test controller and
gates the driver invocation.

### Impact
Authenticated users with connection-test permission could probe internal services
(Redis, the cloud metadata endpoint, internal databases) reachable from the NocoDB
process. A DNS rebinding attacker could still race the resolve-vs-connect window.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@helwor-01](https://github.com/helwor-01).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00207, "percentile": 0.10728}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-w43h-r5m5-p832", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w43h-r5m5-p832", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-w43h-r5m5-p832"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47382"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-w43h-r5m5-p832", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w43h-r5m5-p832"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-w43h-r5m5-p832", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Server-Side Request Forgery via Database Connection Host", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-w43h-r5m5-p832", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Server-Side Request Forgery via Database Connection Host
